title: User Registration Success
description: Verify that a user can successfully register a new account with valid email and password within 2 minutes.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page.
Enter valid email, strong password, and required profile details.
Submit the registration form.
Confirm that registration completes and user is redirected to welcome flow.
Verify user data is stored securely with encrypted content storage.

title: User Registration Failure on Invalid Input
description: Verify registration fails and appropriate error messages are shown when invalid email or weak password is submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page.
Enter invalid email format or weak password.
Submit the registration form.
Verify appropriate validation messages are displayed and registration is blocked.

title: User Login Success with Valid Credentials
description: Verify that a registered user can log in successfully using valid email and password, receiving a valid JWT token.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter registered email and correct password.
Click the login button.
Confirm user is authenticated and redirected to dashboard.
Verify JWT token is issued and stored for session management.

title: User Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Verify login fails with incorrect password or non-existent email, showing an error message without exposing sensitive information.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter valid email and incorrect password.
Attempt to login.
Verify login is denied with appropriate error message.

title: Password Reset Workflow Success
description: Verify the password reset process completes successfully: user requests reset, receives email, and sets new password.

steps.description: Navigate to the password reset page.
Enter registered email and submit password reset request.
Verify password reset email is sent and user receives reset link.
Open reset link and enter new valid password.
Submit the new password.
Confirm password reset completes and user can login with new password.

title: Project Creation and Basic Metadata Setup
description: Verify that a user can create a new writing project with required metadata fields and the project appears in the project dashboard.

steps.description: Login to user account and navigate to project dashboard.
Initiate new project creation and enter mandatory metadata (title, description, genre).
Submit the project creation form.
Verify the new project is listed in the dashboard with correct metadata.

title: Chapter Creation and AI Generation
description: Verify users can create a new chapter within a project and use AI writing engine to generate content maintaining narrative coherence under 60 seconds.

steps.description: Select a project and initiate new chapter creation.
Set chapter title and context parameters.
Trigger AI generation for the chapter.
Verify AI-generated content is coherent and completes within 60 seconds.
Edit the chapter content and save progress.
Confirm changes are saved and auto-save triggers every 30 seconds.

title: Chapter Reordering Via Drag-and-Drop
description: Verify users can reorder chapters within a project using drag-and-drop UI and the new order persists correctly across sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to a project containing multiple chapters.
Drag and drop a chapter to a new position.
Save the reordered chapter list.
Verify the chapters appear in the new order immediately and after logging out and back in.

title: Version History Access and Restore
description: Verify users can access chapter version history for at least 30 days and restore a previous version correctly.

steps.description: Open a chapter and navigate to version history.
Verify multiple historical versions are listed and accessible for at least 30 days.
Select a previous version and restore it.
Confirm the chapter content updates and auto-saves as the restored version.

title: Context Management Consistency During AI Generation
description: Verify that character database, plot threads, world-building elements, and timeline context are automatically and correctly referenced by AI generation during chapter creation.

steps.description: Create or update characters, plot threads, world-building details, and the timeline in the context system.
Initiate AI chapter generation using this enriched project context.
Verify the AI-generated content reflects accurate and consistent references to updated context elements.

title: Export Project in Multiple Formats within Time Limit
description: Verify that projects can be successfully exported in DOCX, PDF, TXT, and EPUB formats with export completion within 30 seconds.

steps.description: Open project export settings and select DOCX format.
Initiate export and measure completion time.
Confirm file is received successfully and export completes within 30 seconds.
Repeat export process for PDF, TXT, and EPUB formats.
Verify all exports complete successfully and within the time limit.

title: Grammar Checking Identifies Common Errors
description: Verify the built-in grammar checking facility identifies common errors (spelling, punctuation, grammar) in real-time during editing.

steps.description: Open a chapter editor and enter text containing common grammar and spelling mistakes.
Verify grammar checker highlights errors and suggests corrections in real-time.
Apply suggested corrections.
Verify errors are resolved after correction.

title: Secure Session Management and Token Refresh
description: Verify that the JWT authentication tokens expire properly and refresh flow maintains secure session management without logging out users unnecessarily.

steps.description: Login and obtain JWT access and refresh tokens.
Simulate token expiration.
Trigger token refresh API.
Confirm new access token is issued and user session continues without logout.
Attempt to access protected resource without tokens.
Verify access is denied and user is prompted to login.

title: Compliance with GDPR and CCPA for User Data
description: Verify that user data handling meets GDPR and CCPA compliance including data access, encryption, and deletion requests.

steps.description: Request user data export via account settings.
Confirm user receives complete exported data in readable format.
Initiate account deletion request.
Verify user data is securely deleted, encrypted storage is cleared, and confirmation is sent.

title: Performance Under 1000 Concurrent Users
description: Verify system maintains 99.5% uptime and performs responsively when handling 1000 concurrent users with simultaneous project and AI generation activity.

steps.description: Simulate 1000 concurrent users performing login, project creation, and AI chapter generation.
Confirm system uptime is >= 99.5% during the test window.
Ensure all pages load within 3 seconds for users under load.
Verify no significant errors or failures occur.

title: Onboarding Flow Completion
description: Verify new user onboarding flow completes successfully in sequence: registration, welcome flow, first project creation, and first chapter generation with tutorial popup.

steps.description: Register a new user account.
Confirm user is taken to welcome flow with introductory content.
Create first project via onboarding wizard.
Verify project creation success and next prompt to create first chapter.
Create first chapter and trigger AI generation.
Confirm AI generation success and display of tutorial guiding user on features.
